productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Wat Duh Pho Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionDark grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% eco-enriched cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, graphic print on the front and threadwork on the back below the neckFittingSlimWash care Machine wash in 30 degrees with like colors Wash dark colors separately Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Do not bleach Reshape garment in wet condition to its original form Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade If confusing others is your hobby, this dark grey tee from classic polo, will come in handy. The color is great, and since it's made of pure cotton, it will keep you comfortable all day long. Team it with jeans or shorts and look fab.
